headline: 5 Power Chip Stocks Built for the Electrification Surge
summary: Silicon carbide and gallium nitride are the choke points in a $trillions electrification wave, and five U.S.-listed chip makers are already collecting the toll. One just survived bankruptcy court, and another trades like a call option on the entire NVIDIA 800V build-out.

raw.headline: 5 Power Chip Stocks Built for the Electrification Surge

headline: 5 Analog Chip Stocks Set to Rebound as the Cycle Changes
summary: Analog chip inventories just hit a turning point that historically precedes a major re-rating, and five names across auto, industrial, and AI power are positioned to capture the move before the window closes.
